title: sorghum exstans
intro: Sorghum exstans is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as broom sorghum or broom grass. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Sorghum exstans include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce the risk of heart disease, and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Sorghum exstans include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams for various health applications.
